title: Genomics
description: The Genomics module integrates genomic data with clinical phenotypes, enabling researchers to conduct genome-wide association studies, variant analysis, and pharmacogenomics investigations within a unified research environment. It supports the linkage of biobank-scale genomic datasets with OMOP CDM clinical records.
tips: Define your clinical phenotype cohorts rigorously before linking to genomic data to ensure high-quality case and control populations.
Leverage FinnGen integration workflows to access pre-processed genomic summary statistics for rapid hypothesis generation.
Review data governance and consent requirements for genomic data linkage before initiating any cross-domain analysis.
Use quality control filters appropriate for your genomic platform to exclude low-quality variants prior to association testing.
Coordinate with your biobank team to align sample identifiers between clinical and genomic datasets to prevent linkage errors.
